module:
Centralized adapter registration for cross-subsystem integration.

This module owns all cross-system type conversion adapters to break circular 
import dependencies between subsystems. Instead of each subsystem registering
adapters for other subsystems (which creates import loops), all adapter 
registration happens in this central module.

initialize_cross_system_adapters.docstring: Initialize all cross-system adapters in the correct order.

_preserve_metadata.docstring:
Standardize metadata handling across conversions.
        
        If original_metadata contains a '_source_metadata' key, it's a nested structure
        that should be unpacked. Otherwise, wrap it in our standardized format.
